items.title: Soft Habits That Quietly Kill Ambition (Before You Notice)
items.hook: Your ambition didn't die in a crisis. It bled out in habits you call 'harmless.'

items.title: The Spy Method: Read Any Room in 10 Seconds
items.hook: Speak first and you lose. Read first and you own the next five minutes.

items.title: Build a Mental Fortress Against Digital Noise
items.hook: If your attention is for rent, your life is already owned.
